transcript.text: Policy up in the very beginning because you don't want confusion under critical moments of too many
Voices. So even all the other flight controllers, all the other people at NASA that are running
Mission, all funnel their information through one guy who then talks to the crew. The first
Deviation from that really important and obviously responsible position was this Sunday afternoon

When the astronauts were falling home, there was nothing to do for two, three days between Earth and Moon, floating zero G, incredible views out the window, the moon receding up the other, and you basically do Earth. So what they do is they set up the first press, we're members of the press.
Got a chance to go on.
